concerns.text: SC-005 states '≥ a specified threshold where applicable to make this criterion measurable' — the threshold value is literally a placeholder. This makes the criterion untestable as written.

SC-010 states 'achieves a predefined match threshold for pass/fail status' without specifying the threshold value. Later text references '≥90%' but SC-010 itself does not contain the measurable value.
SC-013 states 'format validation pass rate meets quality standards' and 'format pass rate ≥ acceptable threshold' — 'acceptable threshold' is not quantified, making this untestable.
SC-014 states 'aims to achieve a high match threshold' — 'high match threshold' is not specified. The ≥90% reference appears in FR-013 but not in SC-014 itself.
SC-003 states reproduction must be 'within acceptable relative error of documented values' — 'acceptable' is not quantified, making verification impossible.

FR-003 contains Wikipedia URL typo: 'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/-bridge_knot' should be 'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2-bridge_knot'. URL does not resolve, affecting verification of cited algorithm.
